_comment: Hand-curated list of articles to display. The build_articles job reads this and computes return-since-pub via yfinance for any entry with a ticker. The site links straight out to each article — we don't scrape titles or images.

Optimism balloons from Japan's reflating economy
articles.label: Japan Reflation
articles.summary: Japan leads the world on bullish sentiment as its economy enters a reflating stage unique among developed nations.

articles.title: India's hopes for solar dominance dimmed but not extinguished
articles.label: India Solar
articles.summary: Two years after India revealed its ambitious 2030 solar power targets, the country's prospects for installing enough capacity on time are darkening.

articles.title: Embracing the Korea discount
articles.label: Korea Discount
articles.summary: Korea's chronically discounted equities are positioned for re-rating as governance reforms and corporate value-up programs take hold.
